sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 92

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 92:1
items.html:
(to the question) Tzelem
When the Mochin are bestowed from the upper one to the lower one, they receive with them clothings from the discernment of the Kelim of the upper one. And those clothings are called Tzelem: the Tzadi is the discernments of NHY, the Lamed is the discernments of HGT, and the Mem is the discernments of KHBD. (Item 67)
